home.title:
Discover
Larmor-Baden
home.subtitle: Your guide to explore the islands, trails and treasures of the Gulf of Morbihan
home.tidesDesc: Check tide times, coefficients and calendar for Larmor-Baden and all Brittany ports. Essential for walking to Berder Island at low tide.
home.secretsDesc: Taste freshly harvested oysters and champagne with your feet in the water, facing the sunset over the Gulf of Morbihan.
home.secretsDescMobile: Freshly harvested oysters & champagne with your feet in the water, facing the Gulf sunset.
home.testimonial1: An unforgettable stay! The Gavrinis cairn is fascinating and the coastal paths offer breathtaking views.
home.testimonial2: Île aux Moines is a true little paradise. Zen atmosphere, beautiful beaches and delicious crêperies.
home.testimonial3: The itinerary planner helped us organize a perfect weekend. The Gulf oysters are the best!
home.mustSeeSubtitle: Major tourist sites listed by the Larmor-Baden municipality
home.gavrinis_desc: Listed megalithic monument, Neolithic engravings from 3500 BC. Accessible only by boat from the port.
home.berder_desc: 23 hectares of nature accessible on foot at low tide. Check tide times on maree.secretsmaree.com before going!
home.pentoul_desc: Protected natural site with 360° view of the Gulf. Regular nature workshops to preserve biodiversity.
home.semaine_desc: Major gathering of traditional sailboats in the Gulf of Morbihan. Unmissable maritime event.
home.shopSubtitle: T-shirts, sweatshirts, mugs and accessories — exclusive designs inspired by the Gulf of Morbihan

souvenirs.sizeAdvice: When in doubt, go one size up. Sizes follow European standards. Pre-shrunk cotton keeps its shape after washing.
